---
name: Mod Template Request
about: Suggest a new built-in mod template or improvement to an existing template.
title: "[Template]: "
labels: template, enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the requested template or template improvement.

## Template Type

- [ ] New template
- [ ] Improvement to an existing template
- [ ] Bug in an existing template
- [ ] Documentation for a template

## Target Game or Workflow

Which game, modding workflow, or authoring scenario is this for?

## Use Case

What should this template help mod authors create?

## Required Assets or Files

List any files, folders, blueprints, content assets, scripts, or metadata the template should include.

## Expected Output

Describe what a user should have after creating a mod from this template.

## Dependencies

Does this template depend on any external SDKs, loaders, frameworks, or game-specific tooling?

## Additional Context

Add references, example projects, screenshots, or links if useful.
